case_title: DALT HOTEL, L.P. VS. JAMES LOWERY

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF REPORTER FEE PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT LOWERY, JAMES
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT LOWERY, JAMES HEARING SET FOR MAY-21-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND SETTLEMENT HEARING HEARING SET FOR MAY-22-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 218

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT JAMES LOWERY WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER AS TO JURY AND REPORTER FEES ARE DENIED. JAMES LOWERY HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)
